dashboardDisplay.title: Dashboard Display
dashboardDisplay.description: Choose how you want to view your dashboard
dashboardDisplay.mapDescription: Explore your dashboard as an interactive island map with pan/zoom controls
dashboardDisplay.simplifiedDescription: View your progress and quick actions in a clean card-based layout
dashboardDisplay.mobileNote: Note: On mobile devices, the simplified dashboard is always used for better usability.

about.title: About
about.appDescription: An intelligent productivity and learning companion.
